rationale.R1.2: The identification strategy rests on a sequential ignorability assumption and AIPW derivation; whether the logical chain from assumption to unbiased ATE estimate is internally coherent is a non-trivial check that any substantive review of this artifact would require.
rationale.R1.3: The paragraph pairs strong interpretive conclusions ('first quantitative evidence that tool-use agents are miscalibrated in a causally meaningful sense') with specific empirical figures (ATE +0.18, CI [0.14, 0.22], correlation 0.31); verifying that these numbers actually support those interpretations is load-bearing under a technical reading.
